boundary_classification_note.classification: public-safe orchestration request with insufficient project binding and evidence
boundary_classification_note.allowed: route shaping, gap identification, owner questions, pending downstream workflow recommendations

scaffold_route.condition: project binding and supported scaffold inputs required

se_assistant_route_packet.source_route: route missing approved source refs to source_gap_followup_packet_v0 or owner input; do not assert source truth
se_assistant_route_packet.storage_boundary: public-safe metadata and pointers only; no private payloads, secrets, absolute paths, project files, or actual payloads under _workmeta

required_owner_inputs: accepted review gate packet or review workflow authorization
accepted verification result or verification workflow authorization
decisions_needed: whether to request the optional scaffold
which approved source or knowledge intake route to use
whether bounded references exist for a readiness digest
whether to open owner decision and review-gate evidence routes

operating_loop_route_map.source_knowledge_intake: blocked pending approved refs; route through source workflow if authorized
operating_loop_route_map.readiness_digest: pending bounded refs and project binding
operating_loop_route_map.owner_decision: pending owner inputs and decision packet creation

next_actions: submit the accepted packet to post_development_review_gate_v0

enforced: missing truth routed to gaps or owner queue
review and verification claims withheld until accepted workflows or results
